description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named PS4 Release Build that triggers on push to the master branch, on pull requests opened or synchronized, on release creation, and on workflow dispatch. In an ubuntu-latest job, check out the repository with full history, install required packages and tools including pacbrew-pacman, and then build the project using a bash script. Finally, upload the devilutionx.pkg artifact to GitHub, unless the ACT environment variable is set.
